articles.title: Aethelgard
articles.excerpt: A vast realm where ancient magic and industrial ingenuity exist in fragile balance, home to four great factions vying for supremacy.

articles.title: Lumina Collective
articles.excerpt: The foremost alliance of aetheric scholars and crystal-mages, dedicated to harnessing the power of Aether-Crystals for the betterment of all.

articles.title: Aether-Crystals
articles.excerpt: Rare mineral formations suffused with primordial magical energy, the cornerstone of both arcane and industrial power throughout Aethelgard.

articles.title: Steam-Golems
articles.excerpt: Massive mechanical constructs powered by pressurised steam and guided by aetheric cores, serving as both laborers and soldiers.

articles.title: Ironclad Dominion
articles.excerpt: A militaristic state built on industrial might and iron discipline, the dominant military power in southern Aethelgard.

articles.title: Whispering Woods
articles.excerpt: An ancient and mysterious forest said to be sentient, home to the Verdant Weavers and countless dangerous flora and fauna.

articles.title: Sky-Merchants Guild
articles.excerpt: The preeminent mercantile organisation of Aethelgard, controlling the vast majority of airborne trade routes across the continent.

articles.title: Cloud-Skimmers
articles.excerpt: Sleek, fast airships designed for high-altitude travel, prized by the Sky-Merchants Guild for rapid courier missions.

articles.title: Life-Threads
articles.excerpt: The metaphysical filaments that connect all living things, manipulated by the Verdant Weavers to heal, grow, and protect.

articles.title: Great Aetheric Rift
articles.excerpt: A colossal fissure in the earth stretching across central Aethelgard, from which raw aetheric energy constantly emanates.
